title: Rich Japanese Sour Cream Gyoza
description: A light and crumbly Japanese dish featuring full fat sour cream, perfect for a snack or dinner. This recipe is jain-friendly and features a jammy texture.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and salt.
Gradually add in the water and knead the dough for 5 minutes.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Divide the dough into small balls and roll out each ball into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of sour cream in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the gyoza to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Remove the gyoza from the skillet and brush with sesame oil and soy sauce.
Serve the gyoza hot with chopped green onions on top.
